# [II · Intrinsic Skill] Image Generate
**ID:** image-generate  
**Type:** Intrinsic Skill  
**Level:** II  
**Rarity:** Uncommon  
**Status:** Provisional

---

## Description
Creates photorealistic or stylized images from text prompts using diffusion-based or autoregressive generative models.
